jobs.title: Data Scientist
jobs.content: <p><strong>Data Scientist</strong></p><p>ComplyAdvantage is the global leader in AI-driven financial-crime risk intelligence and AML compliance — apply machine learning to combat money-laundering patterns at scale.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Director, Revenue Operations
jobs.content: <p>Lead ComplyAdvantage's Revenue Operations function across the Americas — own pipeline, forecasting, and GTM systems for the regtech vertical.</p>
